segments.text: Target Rosa and finding out oh wow she's actually safe from that distance Dabuz is one smash away from setting this home. Goodbye
No way, okay good DI from Samsora over the double jump to give himself away to the blast
Oh fantastic tech always a spike shield the down smash and now he pushes Dabuz offstage
He flew in there from the left side coming in pop it off yours are in the crowd
